headline: Nikita Kucherov is scoring 32% above expectations
body: Nikita Kucherov has scored 37 goals against an expected 28.0 this season (+9.0 goals above expected). Historical data suggests deviations this large tend to normalize.
social_text: Nikita Kucherov is scoring at 1.32x expected (+9.0 GAx). History says this won't last.

headlines.title: Kucherov finishes shorthanded break after Lightning lay out McDavid
